title: What are the EPA recommended actions for power outages in the US?
description: Text response with EPA guidelines from RAG and timeline widget for actions to follow

title: What immediate steps should be taken during a widespread power outage according to US guidelines?
description: Procedural response, uses timeline widget for steps and times and text to show data retrieved.

title: How do disaster response manuals address communication during outages?
description: Shows the protocols on text and the communication phases on a timeline.

title: Which is the visualization of FEMA assistance steps for electrical outages?
description: Mostly explanation text about assistance steps, sometimes a timeline for sequence.

title: Give me some diagrams on how can we identify and evaluate risks according to mexican guidelines?
description: Spanish-English response work, text for the main steps and sometimes a timeline for steps on risk evaluation.

title: Which work orders are still open and their associated asset types?
description: Retrieves from DB and displays table with work orders details, general data on KPI cards and bar graph for compilation of sources.

title: Find circuits with the highest number of customers served
description: DB data showing bar graph with number of customers per circuit, table for details and KPI cards to show general trends.

title: Display asset health distribution by condition score, include names if possible.
description: Requires conditional score, results are displayed on bar graph with assets score groups and a table for details on each asset.

title: What are the most common outage cause categories in the last 6 months?
description: Category-analysis use case for bar chart plus KPI summary and supporting details on a table.

title: Show me the location of the main substations and circuits with characteristics.
description: Geospatial showcase on map and supporting data on table widget

title: Visualize substation locations with capacity indicators
description: Capacity intelligence use case combining map context with infrastructure metrics.

title: Map the outages in residential areas, and then explain, what recovery procedures does the disaster manual recommend?
description: Retrieves DB data for outages and RAG to complete explanation on full view display.

title: Map the outage locations and show also EPA recommended response zones
description: Policy-and-operations geospatial use case to align locations with response guidance.

title: Compare average outage duration by cause category and reference relevant EPA guidelines
description: Comparative analytics plus guideline correlation for evidence-backed operational decisions.

title: Compare outage resolution times for circuits originating from different substations, and what the disaster manual says about response times
description: Advanced comparison use case blending performance metrics with procedural timelines.

title: Trend outage duration by month and explain which EPA actions are recommended when duration increases
description: Focused on outage response time and RAG to retrieve the actions for duration data.

title: Show the location of main substations and provide string advice on how to face a disaster such as fire or earthquake.
description: Retrieves relational data for showing trends on the outage times and timeline for steps.

title: Show location of outages by substation and explain the relation to monthly outage trends based on the response procedures recommended by manuals
description: Retrieves locations, trends of outages and RAG for procedures to display full report.
